narrative:
Precinct Toledo 11I (precinct in Lucas County) has 959 registered voters, with 61.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 12.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 14.4 percentage points.
